title: Fan Heater, Portable Space Heater, 600/1200W PTC Electric Heater, Tip-Over and Overheat Protection, Home Low Energy, Safe & Quiet for Office Room Desk Indoor Use（90° Oscillating）
features: 【6 Modes Adjustable Thermostat】： Include natural wind, low/high temperature, oscillating natural wind, oscillating low/high temperature. Two power outputs allow alternative heating levels from small or large room under 600 watts and 1200 watts.

【GREAT HELPER TO WARM YOUR CORNER】： With 90° oscillation, this space heater for indoor use increase the heat distribution range by 25% for even warmth, so that you can get the fast widespread, comfortable and efficient heating comfort.

【Low Noise & Portable】： The noise this small ceramic heater makes is lower than 45 dB, quiet enough for most people to use in a bedroom while sleeping. It is lightweight and easy to carry, simply move to the area you need to warm or cool and choose your preferred fan setting.

【Overheat Protection】： The heater is made of flame retardant material to achieve zero fire hazard. Tip-over protection shut off heater when it's knocked over, perfect for houses have kids and pets. Overheat protection will shut heater off automatically when the heater overheat.
【Heat Up Fast】： Equipped with ceramic heating elements and rated power up to 1200 watts, our PTC space heater heats up to 70°F in 3 seconds to quickly provide warmth for relatively small spaces.
description: Product Description Joomouney's Choice Joomouney Electric Space Heater Thrillingly fast. Feel the thrilling heat on cold days.
